name: CodeThrone
desc: CodeThrone is a LeetCode-style coding practice platform designed to help users strengthen problem-solving skills through curated challenges. It features algorithmic problems, test case validation, game feature, discord feature and instant feedback, enabling learners to practice, debug, and optimize solutions.

name: Karrish AI Website Builder
desc: KarRish is a smart, elegant, and fully interactive AI-based website builder that lets users generate complete frontend websites using just natural language prompts.✨ Whether you're a developer, designer, student, or someone with a brilliant idea but no coding experience — KarRish helps you bring your vision to life in seconds.

name: DSA Visualizer App
desc: An interactive platform designed to help users master Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) through dynamic visualizations, real-time execution, and engaging challenges.

name: JanSaathi
desc: JanSaathi is a government schemes discovery platform designed to help Indians find and access relevant welfare schemes, benefits, and social programs. Built with AI-powered eligibility checks, document verification via blockchain, and multi-language support.

name: Uber LLD Designed Application
desc: RideFlow is a comprehensive ride-sharing platform built with clean architecture principles, demonstrating the implementation of multiple design patterns and SOLID principles. This system provides a robust foundation for a scalable ride-sharing service.

name: Amazon Price Recommendation System Using SMTP
desc: A data-driven system that analyzes Amazon product pricing, discounts, and user engagement metrics to generate price recommendations, with automated email notifications sent via SMTP for alerts, insights, and updates.

name: Imperial Restaurant Application
desc: Welcome to my first full stack project implemented using HTML , CSS , JS , NODEJS , EJS , TAILWIND , EXPRESS MODULES , POSTGRES AS DATABASE AND APIs a few .This project is welcomed for any suggestions or improvements by you , thank you.

name: SRS Tours and Travels Application
desc: A comprehensive Travel and Tourism website built with Django framework, providing an all-in-one platform for tour planning, bus booking, flight booking, and data visualization with advanced algorithms.

name: Data Science Projects
desc: Projects that are built to enhance knowledge in Artificial intelligence Soft computing , Data Science and Machine learning

name: PDF to Speech Flask
desc: Upload PDF files via drag-and-drop or file picker - Convert PDF text to speech - Live captions synchronized with audio playback - Beautiful, responsive UI - Auto-delete audio after session ends (no file storage) - Fast processing with in-memory operations

name: StockMaster
desc: A modern inventory management system for businesses ready to leave manual tracking behind.

name: Healthcare Management System
desc: A comprehensive healthcare management platform featuring appointment scheduling, provider management, patient portals, and administrative dashboards with Google Calendar integration.

name: DocAnalysis: AI-Powered Research Document Analysis Platform
desc: DocAnalysis is a comprehensive, modern platform designed to ingest, analyze, and unlock insights from complex research documents. It leverages advanced, transformer-based NLP models to provide deep semantic understanding, moving far beyond traditional keyword search. Organize your research into projects, automatically fetch papers from academic sources like PubMed, and use our interactive dashboard to explore entities, relationships, and thematic clusters within your corpus.

name: Tambola Game
desc: This project is made to create a simple Tambola Judge to help people play together with ease .

name: Portfolio Website
desc: Personal Portfolio Website. Don't Need Much Info About It, Just Scroll Down. You're Here Only!

name: Smart Education Moodle Web Application
desc: A comprehensive educational technology platform built with React frontend and Flask backend, featuring modern UI, real-time collaboration, and AI-powered features.

name: Certificate Generator
desc: Create professional certificates with AI-powered enhancements, multiple templates, and instant downloads

name: CHATBOT_RISHI-KA-DSA-GURU
desc: Welcome to Rishi Ka DSA Guru, your personal chatbot for mastering Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA), UPSC topics, relationship advice, gym motivation, and more — all in one interactive voice-assisted platform!

name: Cricket Trivia
desc: Just database connection learning , along with some ipl trivia questions .

name: Rominos Pizza OS Website
desc: This project demonstrates the use of OS scheduling algorithms like First Come first serve , Round Robin , Priority Scheduling and Shortest job first which considers real time scenario like cooking time , delivery time and time of arrival .

name: Blog Website
desc: Welcome to my blog website—a feature-rich, dynamic, and visually appealing platform designed to provide a seamless user experience. This project integrates various functionalities, making it more than just a blog. From interactive applications to note management tools, the website serves as a hub for creativity and engagement. With a polished interface, intuitive navigation, and smooth animations, it offers an enjoyable journey for every user.

name: Daily-Writing-Goal-Tracker
desc: It is a website which allows you to add your notes in two different ways , either as your own sticky notes or the notes marked in the calendar(we indians usually mark exam dates on house-calendars) . To add salt to it , I have also added a quiz part which challenges you to play our own KBC .. Come and Lets play this out , have your recommendations on this repository.
